Bash(/opt/fiery-eyes/venv/bin/pip install telethon 2>&1)
Bash(git status -u)
Bash(git init && git add -A && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add Fiery Eyes v2: Health Score engine, KOL tracking, Telegram alpha parsing, shadow trading, and execution pipeline

Upgrades the intelligence/scoring system to a full degen meme execution system \(Jingubang H\).
Existing Quality Gate, 3 scoring engines, regime multiplier, telegram alerts, and nightly reports
are preserved. New layer adds: Health Score v2 with 5-signal scoring and data confidence,
KOL wallet monitoring via Helius, Krypto King Telegram parser via Telethon, phased entry
pipeline with 4 entry doors, shadow trading with phantom PnL tracking, 4-tier alert severity
with multi-channel routing, Huoyan 4-hourly pulse, moonbag reaper, and graceful degradation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git config user.name "Jingubang" && git config user.email "jingubang@fiery-eyes.dev")

Bash(/opt/fiery-eyes/venv/bin/python -c "
from kol_tracking.monitor import check_kol_wallets
check_kol_wallets\(\)
print\('Done'\)
" 2>&1 | head -30)

Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d fiery_eyes -c "SELECT kw.name, kt.token_symbol, kt.action, kt.detected_at::date FROM kol_transactions kt JOIN kol_wallets kw ON kw.id = kt.kol_wallet_id ORDER BY kt.detected_at DESC LIMIT 10;")
Bash(pgrep -f "main_v2.py" | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; echo "Old processes cleared")
Bash(/opt/fiery-eyes/venv/bin/python main_v2.py 2>&1)

Bash(git add kol_tracking/monitor.py monitoring/degraded.py && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix KOL exit alert dedup, conviction filter $0 rejection, and degraded mode threshold

Bug 1: Deduplicate exit alerts — skip if already sent for same wallet+token
in last 5 minutes. Exit percentage already correctly sums across all txs.
Bug 2: Conviction filter now explicitly rejects amount_usd == 0 or None.
Bug 3: Degraded mode requires 3 consecutive failures from same source within
10 minutes instead of triggering on single transient 429s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git status)

Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d fiery_eyes -c "SELECT symbol, token_tier, last_health_score::numeric\(5,1\) as health, last_health_confidence::numeric\(5,1\) as conf, health_state, monitoring_interval_min as interval_min FROM tokens WHERE last_health_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY last_health_score DESC LIMIT 30;")

Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d fiery_eyes -c "SELECT token_tier, COUNT\(*\) as count, ROUND\(AVG\(last_health_score\)::numeric, 1\) as avg_health FROM tokens WHERE token_tier IS NOT NULL GROUP BY token_tier ORDER BY avg_health DESC;")
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d fiery_eyes -c "SELECT health_state, COUNT\(*\) as count FROM tokens WHERE health_state IS NOT NULL GROUP BY health_state ORDER BY count DESC;")

Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d fiery_eyes -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE action='buy'\) as buys, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE action='sell'\) as sells, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE is_conviction_buy=true\) as conviction_buys, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE amount_usd > 1\) as with_usd, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE amount_usd = 0\) as zero_usd, ROUND\(SUM\(amount_usd\)::numeric, 2\) as total_usd FROM kol_transactions;")

Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d fiery_eyes -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_scores, COUNT\(DISTINCT token_address\) as unique_tokens, ROUND\(AVG\(scaled_score\)::numeric, 1\) as avg_score, ROUND\(MIN\(scaled_score\)::numeric, 1\) as min, ROUND\(MAX\(scaled_score\)::numeric, 1\) as max, ROUND\(AVG\(confidence_pct\)::numeric, 1\) as avg_conf FROM health_scores;")

Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d fiery_eyes -c "SELECT kt.token_symbol, COUNT\(*\) as txns, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE kt.action='buy'\) as buys, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE kt.action='sell'\) as sells, ROUND\(SUM\(kt.amount_usd\)::numeric, 2\) as total_usd, MAX\(kt.detected_at\)::timestamp\(0\) as last_seen FROM kol_transactions kt WHERE kt.amount_usd > 1 GROUP BY kt.token_symbol ORDER BY last_seen DESC LIMIT 10;")
Bash(git push origin main)
Bash(git checkout master)

Bash(find /opt/fiery-eyes -name "*.py" -type f -exec grep -l "wallet.*quality\\|wallet.*type\\|wallet.*class" {} \\; | head -15)

Bash(curl -s "https://api.llama.fi/v2/chains" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for chain in data:
    if chain.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) in \('solana', 'ethereum', 'base', 'sui'\):
        print\(f\\"{chain['name']}: TVL=\\${chain.get\('tvl',0\)/1e9:.2f}B, keys={list\(chain.keys\(\)\)}\\"\)
" 2>&1)
